title: Ion8 1 Litre Water Bottle with Times to Drink, Leak Proof, Flip Lid, Carry Handle, Dishwasher Safe, BPA Free, Soft Touch Contoured Grip, Ideal for Gym, Health Fitness, 32 oz, White
features: PREMIUM 1L HYDRATION SOLUTION – The ION8 Quench Recyclon bottle offers one-handed drinking with its flip-top lid. Perfect for gym, travel or daily use—stay hydrated anytime, anywhere.
100% LEAK-PROOF SECURITY – With a 240° flip lid and triple-lock closure, this bottle prevents leaks even in a full bag. Ideal for hiking, sport or intense workouts on the go.
HYGIENIC AND EASY MAINTENANCE – Dishwasher-safe, odour-resistant and crevice-free. Its wide mouth allows easy refills and deep cleaning—perfect for gym use and daily hydration.
IMPACT RESISTANT AND ANTI-DROP DESIGN – Lightweight but durable, the Recyclon build resists damage. Its hooked lid prevents drops and makes it easy to grab from any bag.
ECO-FRIENDLY AND TRUSTED BRAND – Made with BPA-free Recyclon, this reusable bottle supports sustainability. ION8 helps you hydrate responsibly—great for you and the planet.
description: From the manufacturer Previous page Next page 1 Designed to Fit 2 Full Flip Lid 3 Easy Carry 4 Easy Clean 5 Award Winning What is Recyclon? Recyclon is a transparent carbon neutral bio-based plastic. Made with plant biomass materials, it also has a lower melting point, which reduces energy used in manufacturing and recycling. Recyclon is a safe material for food containers Can you give me tips on using my ION8 OneTouch bottle? When drinking, you only need to tilt a little, as the spout is positioned to flow perfectly with a minimal tilt. Even a leak-proof bottle can leak if seals are lost or removed. Always check all seals are in place. Spares are readily available. How much water do I need to be well hydrated? The EU recommends 2 to 2.5 liters of fluids daily for adults, including water from food. Aim for 6-8 glasses of water or other beverages. Individual needs vary based on factors like size, age, activity level, climate, and health status. How do I clean my ION8? Before use always rinse the water bottle and cap with cool water. After use always rinse in warm water and dish soap only. You can use the dishwasher in the top rack or on a cool wash. Air dry thoroughly before storing and always store with cap off. How do I care for my ION8 bottle? Do not use brushes or abrasives to scrub, do not freeze when full, do not boil or microwave, do not use for carbonated drinks, do not use in a dishwasher on a very hot wash. Always ensure your leak-proof seals are in place.
